original_question: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?

SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Type of follow-up given", "Cancer type", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Bladder' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';
pred_sql: SELECT `Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx`, `Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control` FROM clinical_trials WHERE `Cancer type` = 'Bladder cancer';

original_question: For bladder cancer trials with median follow-up, what are the trial identifier, author, year, publication type, and follow-up duration in months for both the treatment and control arms?
gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Type of follow-up given", "Cancer type", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Bladder' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';
pred_sql: SELECT NCT, Author, Year, `Originial publication or Follow-up` AS PublicationType, `Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx` AS TreatmentFollowUpMonths, `Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control` AS ControlFollowUpMonths FROM clinical_trials WHERE `Cancer type` = 'Bladder cancer';

pred_sql: SELECT 'Rx' AS Treatment_Arm, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx") AS Median_Follow_Up_Duration FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal Cancer' UNION ALL SELECT 'Control' AS Treatment_Arm, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control") AS Median_Follow_Up_Duration FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal Cancer';
